# Elvinas Žukauskas

**Software Engineer | R&D in Application Security**

[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-%230077B5.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=data:image/svg+xml;base64,)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/elvinas-%C5%BEukauskas/)

---

## About Me
Software Engineer working in R&D, with a focus on application-level security. My work involves researching, prototyping, and developing application protection techniques, including code hardening, anti-tampering, anti-static analysis, and detection and protection from unsafe environments.

Outside of my R&D work, I enjoy exploring new technologies, programming languages, frameworks, and tools.

On top of that, I'm also a game development enthusiast, occasionally participating in game jams and building small projects.
